title: Global Markets Brief — 22 Jul 2026
intro: Risk-on sentiment prevails as US equities surge and commodities rally, driven by easing inflation concerns and strong corporate earnings, though crypto weakness suggests selective profit-taking.

sections.heading: 🌍 MACRO TONE
sections.content: Risk-on sentiment prevails as US equities surge and commodities rally, driven by easing inflation concerns and strong corporate earnings, though crypto weakness suggests selective profit-taking.

sections.heading: 📊 FX RANKING
sections.content:
EUR +0.09% — Eurozone economic data surprises to upside, ECB hawkish tone supports
USD +0.03% — Mixed performance as safe-haven demand wanes amid risk appetite
GBP -0.04% — Sterling consolidates after recent gains, BOE policy uncertainty weighs
CHF -0.01% — Safe-haven flows diminish as equities rally
JPY -0.03% — Yen weakness persists at 163 despite intervention speculation
CAD -0.04% — Loonie underperforms despite oil strength on domestic concerns
AUD -0.10% — Aussie slides on China growth worries offsetting commodity gains
NZD -0.12% — Kiwi weakest on dovish RBNZ expectations and risk rotation

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EURUSD 1.1414 | Bias: LONG | Watch: 1.1380 support holds for continuation to 1.1450
USDJPY 163.09 | Bias: SHORT | Watch: 163.50 resistance, intervention risk increases above 164.00
AUDUSD 0.6996 | Bias: NEUTRAL | Watch: 0.7000 psychological level, China data critical

sections.heading: 📈 INDICES
sections.content:
S&P 500 5748 +0.83% — Tech leadership drives gains, earnings optimism building
Nasdaq 25837 +1.29% — Semiconductor and AI stocks rally on demand outlook
Dow Jones 52225 +0.74% — Industrials participate in broad-based advance
Nikkei 225 66062 -0.26% — Profit-taking after recent highs, yen weakness cap losses

sections.heading: 🛢️ COMMODITIES
sections.content:
Gold $4130 +1.32% — Safe-haven bid from geopolitical tensions and central bank buying
WTI Crude $86.07 +2.05% — Supply concerns and summer demand expectations drive rally
Silver $59.77 +1.13% — Industrial demand optimism and gold correlation support gains

sections.heading: ₿ CRYPTO
sections.content:
Bitcoin $65898 -0.92% — Consolidation below $66K as institutional flows pause, support holds at $64K
Ethereum $1916 -0.62% — ETH underperforms amid network competition concerns, watch $1900 support

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: EURUSD | 1.1380-1.1400 | Eurozone momentum and dollar weakness favor upside break
LONG: Gold | 4100-4115 | Geopolitical premium and central bank demand support dips
SHORT: USDJPY | 163.50-164.00 | Intervention risk escalates, overbought technical conditions
SHORT: Bitcoin | 66500-67
